description: Container for identity and ownership information of a resource.

id.description: Unique identifier of a resource within entire ODF node. Automatically assigned upon resource creation.

name.description: Symbolic name of a resource that identifies it within a scope of an onwing account.

account.description: Reference to an account that owns the resource.

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize, categorize, and query resources.

annotations.description: Annotations is a key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata. Unlike labels, annotations are not indexed and cannot be queried by.
